name: BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices
notes: This Building Block defines all data loss prevention (DLP) devices on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Guardium, Symantec DLP, Vormetric Data Security, Vericept Content 360, Zscaler Nss, Verdasys Digital Guardian
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: DLP Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Guardium, Symantec DLP, Vormetric Data Security, Vericept Content 360, Zscaler Nss, Verdasys Digital Guardian
